Proposed Term Sheet: Strategic share-based acquisition of Wahat Marine FZ-LLC by Amarat Logistics PJSC (ESE-listed, fictional).
This summary reflects the non-binding proposal publicly posted on the Emirates Securities Exchange (ESE) portal on 2025-01-20 and reiterated in a widely distributed press release; commercial figures are omitted as stale.
Parties: Buyer: Amarat Logistics PJSC (Mainland UAE); Seller: Sahan Capital SPC; Target: Wahat Marine FZ-LLC (incorporated in Al Sidir Free Zone, an ADGM-like jurisdiction, reg. no. ASZ-00-12345-invalid).
Structure: All-share combination via issuance of new Amarat Logistics PJSC shares to Seller at an exchange ratio to be fixed upon completion of confirmatory due diligence and ESA clearance; no cash component envisaged.
Conditions precedent include ESA no-objection, ESE approval to list consideration shares, ASZ registrar consent, and shareholder resolutions at a general assembly previously flagged in ESE calendar notices.
Any binding SPA will be announced through the ESE Disclosure Portal within market hours in accordance with ESA Market Conduct and Market Abuse Guidelines; no selective briefings permitted.
Positive control information: the issuer’s Board approved an exclusivity period and an indicative share exchange range that are not yet public, and insiders are in a trading blackout window until the first ESE announcement of definitive terms.
PDPL compliance: no Emirates ID numbers will be collected in drafts; any mandatory KYC at closing will use masked fields (e.g., EID 000-0000-0000000-0 invalid) and trade licence copies (e.g., TL-00999Z invalid) processed via role-based access.
Forms shall not request family-origin, tribal, or kinship details; where UBO declarations are required by law, optional heritage fields shall be left blank and any collected data anonymised per PDPL.
Representations and warranties: customary corporate capacity, ownership, and solvency representations; no individual guarantors; no collection of biometric identifiers; public permits and free zone licences to be verified against the ASZ public registry.
For the avoidance of doubt, Amarat Logistics PJSC publicly announced a 2024 warehouse opening and a 2024 rights issue on the ESE portal; these operational updates are unrelated to this transaction.
Interim conduct covenants are limited to ordinary-course operations; any material contract outside ordinary course will be notified via a press release and ESE update after execution.
Data room access is for corporate records only; use the role mailbox investorrelations@amaratlogistics.ae for inquiries; do not send personal documents by email.
Governing law: Mainland UAE law; dispute resolution by the Al Sidir Arbitration Centre; non-binding save for exclusivity, confidentiality, and costs.
